extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports, against the Company, 0 criminal proceedings, 11 tax proceedings, 0 statutory/regulatory proceedings, and 1 civil litigation; all “By” rows for the Company, Directors, Promoters and Subsidiary are excluded, while the subsidiary has nil matters against it. The stated aggregate amount involved against the Company is ₹185.77 million, including the quantified tax matters; promoter/director personal matters and “By” matters are not included, so this converts to ₹18.577 crore (185.77 ÷ 10). Contingent liabilities use the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹217.69 million as of June 30, 2022, the latest date shown, converting to ₹21.769 crore (217.69 ÷ 10) without re-summing line items. The customer concentration disclosure is company-wide and uses revenue from operations: for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2022, top 10 customers contributed 61.99%; no company-wide top-five percentage is disclosed. The source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore at ₹10 million per crore.
